title: A Spark in Nothing
overview: With one single choice, everything changes. One life splits into two realities: one chasing a chance at love, while the other finds solace in music. If one true path is not found, both realities will cease to exist. A reluctant guardian angle, William, finds it challenging to overcome his selfish ways and connect with the boy, James, that he is to look after.
